mapper.sql: instance_id, rnstance_id, pnstance_id, wnstance_id, job_id, trigger_time, run_type, is_retrying AS retrying, run_status, run_start_time, run_end_time, retry_times, next_scan_time, workflow_cur_node, version
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sched_instance ( instance_id, rnstance_id, pnstance_id, wnstance_id, job_id, trigger_time, run_type, dedup_key, run_status, run_start_time, retry_times, workflow_cur_node ) VALUES
( #{item.instanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.rnstanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.pnstanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.wnstanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.triggerTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.runType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.dedupKey,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.runStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.runStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.retryTimes,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.workflowCurNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sched_instance SET run_status = 20, run_start_time = IFNULL(run_start_time, #{runStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}), version = version+1 WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND run_status = 10

UPDATE sched_instance SET run_status = #{toStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
run_end_time = IF(run_start_time IS NULL, NULL, #{runEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}),
version = version+1 WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND run_status IN (#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sched_instance WHERE pnstance_id = #{instanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND run_type = 3 AND run_status < 40
SELECT FROM sched_instance WHERE pnstance_id = #{instanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND run_type = 3
SELECT FROM sched_instance WHERE wnstance_id = #{wnstanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND wnstance_id != instance_id
SELECT FROM sched_instance WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} FOR UPDATE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sched_instance WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND run_status >= 40
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sched_instance
ORDER BY trigger_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT pnstance_id AS pnstanceId, count(*) cnt FROM sched_instance WHERE pnstance_id IN (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}) GROUP BY pnstance_id
